campaigns.title: Eid Festive Collection 2026
campaigns.description: Promote StyleHub's exclusive Eid luxury pret and lawn collection. We need creators who can authentically showcase festive outfits through styling videos and lookbooks targeting women aged 18–30 in urban Pakistan.
campaigns.requirements: Creator must wear the outfits in at least 2 reels. Mention discount code STYLE10 in bio. No competing brand mentions within 2 weeks of post.

campaigns.title: Summer Lookbook — Lawn Season Drop
campaigns.description: StyleHub's summer lawn collection needs fresh, vibrant content from fashion-forward creators. Ideal for mid-tier creators with strong Instagram aesthetics who can drive clicks to our online store.
campaigns.requirements: Swipe-up link in stories required. Show unboxing + styling. Caption must include #StyleHubPK.

campaigns.title: Ramadan Glow Skincare Kit
campaigns.description: GlowUp Cosmetics is launching a limited-edition Ramadan self-care kit. We want creators who focus on honest skincare reviews and before/after content. Must be female creators with an engaged female audience.
campaigns.requirements: Must use products for 7 days before review. Show morning and night routine. Include promo code GLOW20.

campaigns.title: Foundation Range — Shade for Every Skin Tone
campaigns.description: Launch campaign for 20-shade foundation range designed for South Asian skin tones. We need diverse creators across fair to deep skin tones who can create authentic swatching and wear-test content.
campaigns.requirements: Wear for 8 hours and show wear test results. Mention SPF and coverage level. Hashtag #GlowUpForAll required.

campaigns.title: ArenaX Season 5 Tournament Promo
campaigns.description: ArenaX is hosting Pakistan's biggest esports tournament with PKR 5M prize pool. We need top gaming creators to build hype through gameplay previews, bracket reveals, and live commentary.
campaigns.requirements: Must include registration link in bio and video description. At least one 15-min gameplay video. Mention prize pool and dates. No competitor esports mention.

campaigns.title: ArenaX Gaming Chair — Setup Review
campaigns.description: Promote ArenaX's new pro gaming chair series. Looking for creators with dedicated setup/battlestation audiences who can do an honest long-form review covering comfort, build quality, and aesthetics.
campaigns.requirements: Minimum 10-minute video. Show chair assembly. Include affiliate link with 10% discount for viewers. Must not be promoted as gifted — paid partnership disclosure required.

campaigns.title: NexaCloud Platform B2B Launch
campaigns.description: Enterprise SaaS launch targeting Pakistani tech startups and mid-size businesses. Need thought-leader creators in tech/business space who can communicate complex cloud infrastructure value in an accessible way.
campaigns.requirements: Must demo the platform live. Mention 3-month free trial offer. LinkedIn article required in addition to video. Creator must have B2B/tech audience profile.

campaigns.title: Dev Community Awareness — Code with NexaCloud
campaigns.description: Target Pakistan's developer community through educational content about cloud-native development. Ideal for creators with coding/dev audiences who can show real use-cases through tutorials.
campaigns.requirements: Each video must include a live coding demo using NexaCloud APIs. Mention free-tier plan. Creator must disclose paid partnership.

campaigns.title: New Year Fitness Challenge — 30 Days
campaigns.description: ActiveZone is running a 30-day transformation challenge at the start of 2026. We need fitness creators to document their own journey using our supplements and gym gear and inspire followers to sign up.
campaigns.requirements: Post weekly progress update. Day 1 and Day 30 photos mandatory. Tag #ActiveZone30Day. Include link to challenge signup page in bio.

campaigns.title: Protein Supplement Review — Honest Opinions
campaigns.description: ActiveZone wants real, unsponsored-feeling reviews of our new whey and plant-based protein range. We value authenticity over polish. Creators should show actual workout sessions and discuss taste, mixability, and results.
campaigns.requirements: Use product for minimum 2 weeks before review. Show shaker in video. Include discount code AZ15 for 15% off. Honest review — negative points allowed.

campaigns.title: Karachi Food Tour — TastePK Discovery
campaigns.description: TastePK is documenting Karachi's hidden food gems in a city-wide food tour campaign. We want food creators who have local food knowledge and can shoot street food and restaurant content with mouth-watering quality.
campaigns.requirements: Visit minimum 5 locations. Tag restaurant handles. Use #TastePKTour. Show price per dish for audience context. Content must be shot in Karachi only.

campaigns.title: Home Chef Recipe Series — TastePK Originals
campaigns.description: TastePK wants to build a weekly recipe content series on YouTube and Instagram. Looking for home-cooking creators who can make restaurant-quality recipes using TastePK's spice blends and sauces.
campaigns.requirements: Each video must feature TastePK product prominently. Show ingredient list on screen. Caption must include a printable recipe link. 4 episodes over 4 weeks.

campaigns.title: Urban Living — Apartment Aesthetic Campaign
campaigns.description: UrbanVibe Co. is promoting its new home décor and furniture line for young urban professionals. Need lifestyle creators with aesthetically strong feeds who live in apartments and can style product in real home settings.
campaigns.requirements: Style products in creator's own home — no studio shots. Include a room tour or transformation reel. Tag @UrbanVibePK in all posts. No fast-fashion brand mentions.

campaigns.title: Home Makeover Series — UrbanVibe Transformation
campaigns.description: A 3-part content series where creators transform a room in their home using UrbanVibe products. Budget includes product cost. Looking for creators who can document the before, during, and after process authentically.
campaigns.requirements: 3-part series: Part 1 (planning + haul), Part 2 (in-progress), Part 3 (reveal). Each part within one week. Must show product pricing for transparency.

campaigns.title: Northern Areas Summer Travel Series
campaigns.description: WanderlustPK is documenting Pakistan's stunning northern areas — Hunza, Skardu, Gilgit, Naltar. We need travel creators with immersive videography skills who can make audiences want to book immediately.
campaigns.requirements: Trip expenses covered by WanderlustPK. Must include WanderlustPK booking link in bio. Minimum 2 YouTube vlogs and 4 Instagram reels. Drone footage required.

campaigns.title: Hunza Valley — Book Before Winter
campaigns.description: Last-call campaign to fill autumn travel packages to Hunza before the season closes. Need creators who can drive urgent bookings through compelling short-form content showing autumn foliage and crisp mountain air.
campaigns.requirements: Include a limited-time discount code HUNZA20. Show real footage — no stock. Swipe-up story link required. Posting window: Oct 1–15 only.

campaigns.title: EduReach Platform Launch — Learn Anything
campaigns.description: EduReach is launching Pakistan's first AI-powered online learning platform with 500+ courses in tech, business, design, and languages. Need edu-creators who can explain the platform's value and demonstrate 2–3 courses.
campaigns.requirements: Complete one full course before review. Show course interface screen recording. Include LEARN50 promo code for 50% off first month. Must do a live Q&A session.

campaigns.title: Skill Up Pakistan — Digital Literacy Drive
campaigns.description: EduReach wants to reach students and young professionals across Pakistan with its free digital literacy courses. Need creators who can communicate the importance of tech skills in today's job market.
campaigns.requirements: Show at least 3 free courses available. Emphasize no-cost access. Share one personal learning story. Caption must include #SkillUpPakistan.

campaigns.title: InvestSmart App — Your First Investment
campaigns.description: InvestSmart Pakistan is launching a mobile app that makes investing in mutual funds and gold accessible to everyone. We need credible finance creators who can demystify investing for first-time investors.
campaigns.requirements: Show live app demo including account setup. Explain investment options clearly. Include SECP registration disclaimer. Creator must not recommend specific stocks. Include INVEST500 referral code.

campaigns.title: Financial Literacy for the Next Generation
campaigns.description: A long-form educational series aimed at young Pakistanis aged 22–35 covering budgeting, saving, and basic investing. InvestSmart wants to build trust and brand affinity before pushing product.
campaigns.requirements: 4-part video series: Budgeting, Saving, Investing 101, Growing Wealth. One video per week. Show relatable real-life examples. Soft mention of InvestSmart app in final episode.

applications.note: I have styled Eid collections for 3 previous brands and have strong engagement from female audiences in Karachi aged 20–28.
My Eid content last year reached 2.1M accounts. I specialize in luxury pret and have professional photography equipment.
Would love to combine fashion with my lifestyle angle for this Eid series.
Skincare is my core niche. I have reviewed 50+ products and my audience trusts my honest opinions completely.
I focus on halal and clean beauty. My audience is primarily women aged 22–35 who are conscious about ingredients.
I have covered esports tournaments on my channel before including DreamHack Pakistan 2024. My audience is 85% male gamers.
I am Pakistan's most-followed gaming creator on YouTube with 325K subscribers. ArenaX is already a brand I respect.
I can cover this from a tech and esports infrastructure perspective for my tech-savvy audience.
I have 200K tech followers and cover SaaS and cloud regularly. I can deliver an in-depth platform teardown.
As a software engineer and creator I can show NexaCloud from a developer's practical perspective.
I am a certified nutritionist and personal trainer. My 30-day challenges regularly get 1000+ participant sign-ups.
I post daily workout content and my followers are highly motivated fitness enthusiasts. I can drive real challenge participation.
Born and raised in Karachi — I know the hidden gems and my food tour content consistently gets 100K+ views.
Professional food photographer with 133K following. I can capture the visual appeal of street food in a premium way.
I cover travel and food together — this campaign would fit my travel food content series perfectly.
I live in Islamabad and my apartment aesthetics are exactly on-brand for UrbanVibe. Strong interior content track record.
Lifestyle content is my specialty. 207K followers and consistently strong engagement on home and décor content.
I have solo-traveled the northern areas 4 times. My vlogs from Hunza have over 500K total views.
Northern Pakistan travel is my passion. I have a Canon R6 and DJI Mini 4 Pro for cinema-quality drone shots.
I run an educational channel focused on online learning and career development. Platform reviews are my most-watched content.
My audience consists mostly of university students and recent graduates seeking skill development resources.
I explain investment concepts for beginners. My audience is 70% first-time investors aged 25–35 in Pakistan.
Finance is my niche. I simplify complex topics like mutual funds and SIPs for everyday Pakistanis.
